event.title: I Love Free Software Day in Staffordshire, United Kingdom in Staffordshire, United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland

body.p:
FSFE Potteries are organizing "I Love Free Software Day 2025" event that is happy to welcome all Free Software enthusiasts.
It will be held upstairs at KPA Clubhouse, 97 Horwood Road, Keele University, Keele, Staffordshire
More information is available on the local group's calendar: https://wiki.fsfe.org/LocalGroups/Potteries/Calendar

tags.tag: United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland
